input.diff:
diff --git a/setup/05-programming-languages.sh b/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
index 0b56562..6b98444 100755
--- a/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
+++ b/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
@@ -22,10 +22,17 @@
 export PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH"
 echo 'export PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH"' >> /etc/profile.d/go.sh
 
-# ---- Rust (stable) ----
+# ---- Rust (stable, system-wide) ----
+export RUSTUP_HOME=/usr/local/rustup
+export CARGO_HOME=/usr/local/cargo
 curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
-export PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"
-echo 'export PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"' >> /etc/profile.d/rust.sh
+cat > /etc/profile.d/rust.sh <<'RUSTENV'
+export RUSTUP_HOME=/usr/local/rustup
+export CARGO_HOME=/usr/local/cargo
+export PATH="/usr/local/cargo/bin:$PATH"
+RUSTENV
+chmod 755 /usr/local/rustup /usr/local/cargo
+chmod -R a+rX /usr/local/rustup /usr/local/cargo
input.context: Infrastructure repo for Azure GPU VM provisioning with modular setup scripts

diff --git a/setup/12-shell-environment.sh b/setup/12-shell-environment.sh
index 4f1949b..0549d84 100755
--- a/setup/12-shell-environment.sh

@@ -35,10 +35,8 @@
 git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/tmux-plugins/tpm /etc/skel/.tmux/plugins/tpm 2>/dev/null || true
 
-# Neovim
-curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/nvim "https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim.appimage" 2>/dev/null && \
-  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/nvim || \
-  apt-get install -y neovim

+apt-get install -y neovim

input.diff:
diff --git a/setup/10-security-tools.sh b/setup/10-security-tools.sh
index 7db012f..00b8890 100755
--- a/setup/10-security-tools.sh
+++ b/setup/10-security-tools.sh
@@ -55,15 +55,26 @@
 curl -sSfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anchore/syft/main/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin
 
-# ---- Python OSINT & security tools ----
-pip3 install --break-system-packages \
-  sherlock-project maigret \
-  dnsrecon sublist3r \
-  scoutsuite \
-  impacket pwntools scapy \
-  volatility3 \
-  oletools pdfid \
-  hashid arjun 2>/dev/null || true
+# ---- Python OSINT & security tools (uv tool for isolation + speed) ----
+export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH"
+command -v uv &>/dev/null || curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
+
+# Fast installs (pure Python, no compilation)
+uv tool install sherlock-project 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install maigret 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install dnsrecon 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install hashid 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install arjun 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install oletools 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install pdfid 2>/dev/null || true
+
+# Heavier installs (C compilation -- isolated to avoid conflicts)
+uv tool install scoutsuite 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install impacket 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install pwntools 2>/dev/null || true
+
+# pip for tools that need system-level integration
+pip3 install --break-system-packages scapy volatility3 sublist3r 2>/dev/null || true
input.context: Security tools installation for penetration testing VM

 variable "os_disk_size_gb" {
-  description = "OS disk size in GB. 256GB recommended for model weights."
+  description = "OS disk size in GB. 512GB recommended for model weights."
   type        = number
-  default     = 256
+  default     = 512
+}
+
+variable "hf_token" {
+  description = "HuggingFace API token for downloading gated models (Meta Llama, Google Gemma)"
+  type        = string
+  sensitive   = true
 }

input.diff:
diff --git a/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh b/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
--- a/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
+++ b/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
@@ -10,8 +10,12 @@
 python3 -m venv /opt/vllm-env
-pip install vllm
+# vLLM nightly for Gemma 4 support (requires transformers 5.5.0)
+curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
+export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH"
+uv pip install --python /opt/vllm-env/bin/python -U vllm --pre \
+  --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly/cu129 \
+  --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu129 \
+  --index-strategy unsafe-best-match
+uv pip install --python /opt/vllm-env/bin/python transformers==5.5.0
input.context: AI/ML stack setup for GPU VM with vLLM inference server

diff --git a/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh b/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
--- a/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
+++ b/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # CUDA toolkit
-apt-get install -y cuda-toolkit-12-4
+apt-get install -y cuda-toolkit-12-8
 
 # NVIDIA container toolkit
 distribution=$(. /etc/os-release;echo $ID$VERSION_ID)
@@ -15,3 +15,6 @@
 apt-get update
 apt-get install -y nvidia-container-toolkit
 nvidia-ctk runtime configure --runtime=docker
+
+# Verify GPU access
+nvidia-smi || echo 'WARNING: nvidia-smi failed - GPU may not be available yet'
input.context: GPU driver setup for CUDA workloads on Azure VMs
